programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "AOPA Summit"
programme.desc: The annual event of the Aircraft Owners and Pilots Association. We take you inside the aerial unit of the Los Angeles Police Department to see how the world’s largest police fleet helps to catch bad guys and Jeff talks to Red Bull Air Racer Pete McLeod, about life as a high-adrenalin, competitive flyer.

programme.title: The Aviators S2 - "Triple Tree Aerodrome"
programme.desc: A look at one of the most meticulously maintained grass runways anywhere at what we discovered to be a pure haven for lovers of aviation and the outdoors. All aboard Fat Albert Airlines, the Blue Angels’ incredible USMC C130T and Sara meets Peyton McCool and takes a spin (literally) in his Soviet-era trainer.

programme.title: Bright Now S1 - "Message From Space?"
programme.desc: Deep in the mountains of West Virginia, the Green Bank Observatory has been receiving a mysterious signal from deep space. Could this be message from an advanced civilization, or is it a much stranger and violent occurrence?

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S1 - "Terry Vs Gorn"
programme.desc: Captain James T Kirk’s battle with the Gorn alien is one of the most popular episodes from the original series. He defeats the Gorn by creating gunpowder from the base elements found on the planet.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S2 - "Terry Down Under"
programme.desc: Terry and Larry start off the new season testing one of the most requested films, Quigley Down Under. Terry will see if he can hit a 564-yard shot with a Sharps rifle. An 800-yard shot, trying to kill 2 bad guys with 1 bullet!

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S2 - "Bond, Terry Bond"
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be testing the effectiveness of driving a vehicle with fully automatic machine guns mounted to the car! Just like 007 did with his Aston Martin DB5.

programme.title: Hollywood Weapons: Fact or Fiction? S2 - "Just-Terry-Fied"
programme.desc: Terry and Larry will be test 2 scenes from Justified where, Terry, aka Raylan Givins finds himself in a bathtub and a dead body lying over top of him.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Spirit of Discovery"
programme.desc: Dive in and check some ingenious inventions that have changed our daily lives.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Porsche Sound Nacht"
programme.desc: Go on a journey through the sounds of the most iconic Porsche engines.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Energy Globe Award 21st - Part 1"
programme.desc: Watch the first part of a feature on the second award ceremony for sustainability projects that can change the world.

programme.title: Skuld: A Look into the Future S1 - "Energy Globe Award 21st - Part 2"
programme.desc: Watch the second part of a feature on the second award ceremony for sustainability projects that can change the world.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain S1 - "Time"
programme.desc: Jack meets a woman who has lost all sense of time and reveals how time can be elastic.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain S1 - "The Senses"
programme.desc: Jack meets people with synaesthesia and experiences multisensory gastronomy.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain S1 - "Pain & Fear"
programme.desc: Wim Hof teaches Jack how to control his pain and plunge into the ice cold sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Brain S1 - "Creativity"
programme.desc: Jack meets a man with Sudden Artistic Output syndrome and unleashes his creativity.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans S1 - "Human Megaphone / Human Toolbox"
programme.desc: Thom's latest quest introduces him to Annalisa, who has the worlds loudest shout and to Brad Byers, who has the ability to force metal objects up his nose.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans S1 - "Snake Eye / Heatproof Man"
programme.desc: On this leg of the search, Thom meets a man capable of squirting liquid from his tearducts and a man who claims to have heatproof hands.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans S1 - "Ice-Proof / Bullet Proof Man"
programme.desc: Thom meets a man with an extreme resistance to the cold and meets someone who developed a form of martial art, to make him indestructible.

programme.title: Extraordinary Humans S1 - "Skull of Steel / Shock Proof"
programme.desc: Thom meets a man who claims to have a skull capable of withstanding extreme forces and Serbian Biba Struger who claims to be immune to electrocution.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "Manchester"
programme.desc: A bridge in Manchester gets demolished.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "Louisiana"
programme.desc: Explosive demolition of the O. K. Allen Bridge.

programme.title: The Demolition Man S1 - "Lewisham"
programme.desc: A council flat in Lewisham must come down quickly and without harming the local residents’ flats situated only metres away.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Kashmir Powder Keg"
programme.desc: With Kashmir’s special status removed in early August 2019 and terrorist attacks plaguing the region since earlier in the year, the India/Pakistani border-conflict has escalated once more.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Secret War In Laos"
programme.desc: In efforts to remove the Communists, the US conducted a devastating military operation, making Laos the most bombed country per capita - ever. The Laos Civil War has often been called America’s “secret war.”

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Cold War In Central America"
programme.desc: In the 1980s, El Salvador and Nicaragua were fighting vicious civil wars that claimed killed at least 100,000, saw 8000 people disappear, and left hundreds of thousands displaced. Still spearheading a global fight against communism, the US engaged.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Desert War In Mali"
programme.desc: It is a deadly war in the desert, one we know barely anything about. Once the heart of the golden Mali Empire, home to the richest man of the 14th century, the northern town of Timbuktu has become the victim of political instability and terror.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Navy Divers"
programme.desc: Ship divers tackle dangerous missions at sea, from clearing nets and mines to rescuing lives. We explore their intense training and high-stakes work.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Combat Trauma Care"
programme.desc: Combat Casualty Care trains soldiers to save lives on the battlefield, ensuring rapid response to injuries from IEDs and other deadly threats.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Pathfinders"
programme.desc: Pathfinders are elite paratroopers trained to go behind enemy lines, lead air insertions, gather intelligence, and execute high-risk, deadly missions.

programme.title: Combat Forces S1 - "Elite Forces"
programme.desc: Elite Forces are specially trained soldiers who carry out extreme, high-risk missions anywhere in the world, anytime they’re needed.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Cold War In Central America"
programme.desc: In the 1980s, El Salvador and Nicaragua were fighting vicious civil wars that claimed killed at least 100,000, saw 8000 people disappear, and left hundreds of thousands displaced. Still spearheading a global fight against communism, the US engaged.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Desert War In Mali"
programme.desc: It is a deadly war in the desert, one we know barely anything about. Once the heart of the golden Mali Empire, home to the richest man of the 14th century, the northern town of Timbuktu has become the victim of political instability and terror.

programme.title: Secret Wars Uncovered S1 - "Coups Detat"
programme.desc: An uncompromising show of power, the military coup is an age-old method to violently and often secretly topple governments and take control by force. This episode goes behind the scenes of some of the greatest coups in recent history.
